title: Enrich Parking Lot System problem — reference solution, walkthrough, interview script
description: Enrich the Parking Lot System problem (id: prob-parking-lot, difficulty: 2, category: object-modeling). Verify starter classes have sufficient entities (ParkingLot, ParkingFloor, ParkingSpot, Vehicle — currently 4 classes, needs 8+ for complex: add Ticket, PaymentProcessor, EntryGate, ExitGate). Verify all relationships correct (composition: Lot->Floor->Spot, association: Vehicle->Spot). Add referenceSolution with full working Java code for the complete system. Add designWalkthrough with step-by-step reasoning: entity identification, design decisions (Strategy for pricing, Factory for vehicle types, Observer for spot availability), complexity analysis. Add interviewScript simulating 90-min interview dialogue. Add complexityAnalysis for key operations (parkVehicle O(f*s), findSpot O(s)). Verify hints are progressive (5-7 hints, easy to hard). Add edge cases: full lot, oversized vehicle, concurrent parking.
acceptanceCriteria: Starter classes expanded to 8+ entities including Ticket, PaymentProcessor, EntryGate, ExitGate
referenceSolution has complete working Java code with all classes and driver
designWalkthrough covers entity identification, pattern selection, and complexity
interviewScript simulates realistic 90-min interview with interviewer/candidate dialogue
complexityAnalysis covers parkVehicle, findSpot, and payment operations
Hints are progressive (5-7) from easy to hard with edge cases covered

title: Enrich Elevator System problem — reference solution, walkthrough, interview script

Add referenceSolution with full Java code. Add designWalkthrough: Observer for price updates and alerts, Strategy for order matching, Command for order execution, Singleton for exchange. Add interviewScript. Add complexityAnalysis (order matching O(log n) with sorted order book). Add edge cases: partial fills, market vs limit order matching, price volatility, order cancellation, portfolio margin.
acceptanceCriteria: Starter classes at 10+ entities with OrderBook, Trade, Portfolio, PriceAlert
referenceSolution has complete Java code with order matching engine
designWalkthrough covers Observer for prices, Strategy for matching, order book design
interviewScript simulates interview with order matching and real-time updates focus
complexityAnalysis covers order matching, price update broadcast, and portfolio calculation
Hints progressive from entity design to order matching and partial fills
